text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time for summer camp has arrived again. For
Mejiro Ryan, it's a time for both resting and
taking it to the next level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, her journey from "young woman" to
"suave lady" continues!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it's already summer again! I dunno
if I can do this—I stumbled hard right at the start
last year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
How can I become a lady when my romantic
experience is the same as a gym newbie who's
hittin' the weights for the first time?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's all I can think to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If you really believe it'll happen for me, I guess I
can hope everything turns out okay...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
R-right. I'm not the same person I was before. I'm
pretty popular now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My muscles are super jacked, and I don't slip up
during conversations anymore!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But, T-T-Trainer... m-my legs are t-trembling...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may be strong, but her muscles are wavering.
It feels like the whole cabin is shaking along with
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if she can gain some romantic confidence,
these little earthquakes will stop too.
